stemHtml: According to Reg. (EC) No 300/2008, what is correct regarding the security training for crew members?

options.a: It is required only for crew members operating in areas with a high security risk.
options.b: It is required only for crew members involved in passenger transport operations.
options.c: It can be conducted by a qualified instructor or experienced crew member.
options.d: It should be conducted on an initial basis and recurrently.
